name: SportyKids — Sports News for Kids
subtitle: Safe sports news, quizzes & reels
description:
SportyKids delivers age-appropriate sports news for children aged 6 to 14. Follow your favorite teams, watch short sports reels, take daily quizzes, and collect stickers — all in a safe, ad-free environment with full parental controls.

Features:
• Personalized sports feed from 180+ trusted sources
• Short video reels from verified sports channels
• Daily quizzes adapted to your child's age
• Collectible stickers and achievement badges
• Parental controls with PIN, time limits, and content filters
• Weekly activity digest for parents
• Works offline — cached articles available anytime
• No ads, no tracking without consent

Supported sports: Football, Basketball, Tennis, Swimming, Athletics, Cycling, Formula 1, Padel

Privacy first: COPPA and GDPR-K compliant. No data collected without parental consent for children under 13.
keywords: kids sports news,safe news for kids,sports quiz,parental controls,football kids,sports reels
promotionalText: Daily sports quizzes and collectible stickers are here!
whatsNew: First public release. Safe sports news for kids.
shortDescription: Safe sports news for kids aged 6-14
